metadata.name: opsys-integrating-sphere
metadata.summary: python package for integrating sphere devices control

classes.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.__init__
documentation: Initialize parameters

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.scan_ports
documentation:
Check for device connection

Returns:
    bool: True if the device connected, else False

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.connect
documentation:
Connect to integrating sphere

Returns:
    bool: True if connected successfully            
Raises:
    ValueError: if device not connected

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.disconnect
documentation:
Disconnect from integrating sphere

Returns:
    bool: True if disconnected successfully
    
Raises: 
    ValueError: if disconnection failed with error code

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.init_optical_power
documentation:
Initialize optical power measurement for Ophir device

Returns:
    bool: True if initialization successful
Raises:
    ValueError: if initialization failed

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController._format_device_info
documentation:
Format the device and sensor information into a readable string.

Args:
    device_info (tuple): Device information tuple.
    sensor_info (tuple): Sensor information tuple.

Returns:
    str: Formatted device information string.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.get_power_measure
documentation:
Measure optical power

Returns:
    float: measured optical power value

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.set_wavelength
documentation:
Set wavelength for optical power measurement

Args:
    wavelength (int, optional): laser wavelength in nm.
                                Defaults to 940.
Returns:
    bool: True if the wavelength was set successfully
    
Raises:
    ValueError: if wavelength setting failed

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.get_wavelength
documentation:
Get the wavelength of the Ophir device

Returns:
    int: wavelength in nm

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.set_power_gain
documentation:
Set power gain for optical power measurement.

Gain levels correspond to the following settings:
    - 0: Gain AUTO
    - 1: Gain 4.00W
    - 2: Gain 400mW
    - 3: Gain 40.0mW
    - 4: Gain 4.00mW
    - 5: Gain 400uW
    - 6: Gain 40.0uW

Args:
    gain (int): Power gain value.

Returns:
    bool: True if power gain set successfully.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the gain value is not between 0 and 6.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.get_power_gain
documentation:
Get the power gain of the Ophir device

Returns:
    str: power gain value

class_variables.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.ophir_controller.OphirController.VALID_GAIN_VALUES
documentation: Valid gain values: 0 through 6
Ophir Integrating Sphere Controller

classes.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the ISphereController with the specified integrating sphere type.

Args:
    i_sphere_type (str): The type of the integrating sphere, e.g., "OPHIR" or "ARTIFEX".

Raises:
    ValueError: If the specified integrating sphere type is not supported.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController._create_controller
documentation:
Create a controller instance for the specified integrating sphere type.

Returns:
    Controller instance for the specified integrating sphere type.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the specified integrating sphere type is not supported.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.connect
documentation:
Connect to the integrating sphere.

Returns:
    str: The sensor information - model, serial number, firmware version, etc.
    
Raises:
    ValueError: If the device is not connected.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.disconnect
documentation:
Disconnect from the integrating sphere.

Returns:
    bool: True if disconnected successfully.
    
Raises:
    ValueError: If there is an error disconnecting the device.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.init_optical_power
documentation:
Initialize optical power measurement.

Returns:
    bool: True if the device is successfully initialized.            
Raises:
    ValueError: If there is an error initializing the device.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.get_power_measure
documentation:
Measure the optical power.

Returns:
    float: The measured optical power value in [mW].
    
Raises:
    ValueError: If there is an error measuring the optical power.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.set_wavelength
documentation:
Set wavelength for optical power measurement

Args:
    wavelength (int, optional): laser wavelength in nm.
                                Defaults to 940.
Returns:
    bool: True if the wavelength was set successfully
    
Raises:
    ValueError: if wavelength setting failed

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.get_wavelength
documentation:
Get the wavelength for optical power measurement

Returns:
    int: The wavelength in nm

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.set_power_gain
documentation:
Set gain for optical power measurement

Args:
    gain (int): gain value 
    
Returns:
    bool: True if the gain was set successfully
    
Raises:
    ValueError: if gain setting failed

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.i_sphere_controller.ISphereController.get_power_gain
documentation:
Get the gain for optical power measurement

Returns:
    int: The gain value
Integrating Sphere controller class to manage different types of integrating spheres.

classes.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.__init__
documentation: Initialize parameters

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.scan_ports
documentation:
Scan for available COM ports and set the Artifex port if found.

Returns:
    bool: True if a valid COM port is detected.

Raises:
    SerialException: If no valid COM port is detected.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.connect
documentation:
Connect Artifex device to the COM port

Args:
    baudrate (int, optional): port baud rate. Defaults to 15200.
    timeout (int, optional): port timeout. Defaults to 5.

Returns:
    bool: True if connected successfully
Raises:
    SerialException: Error opening COM port

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.disconnect
documentation:
Disconnect from integrating sphere

Returns:
    bool: True if disconnected successfully

Raises:
    ValueError: If there is an error disconnecting the device.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.init_optical_power
documentation:
Initialize the Artifex device.

Returns:
    bool: True if the device is successfully initialized.
Raises:
    ValueError: If there is an error initializing the device.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.get_power_measure
documentation:
Get the optical power from the Artifex device.

Returns:
    float: The measured optical power in milliwatts (mW).

Raises:
    ValueError: If there is an error reading the measured value.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.set_wavelength
documentation:
Set the pulse length for the Artifex device and confirm the setting.

Args:
    wavelength (int, optional): The wavelength to set (e.g., 940\905).
                                Defaults to 940.

Raises:
    ValueError: If there is an error setting the pulse length.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.get_wavelength
documentation: Get the wavelength for the Artifex device not implemented.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.set_power_gain
documentation:
Set the power gain level for the Artifex device and confirm the setting.

Gain levels correspond to the following multipliers:
    - 1: Gain ×1
    - 2: Gain ×10
    - 3: Gain ×100
    - 4: Gain ×1000
    - 5: Gain ×10000

Args:
    gain (int, optional): The gain level to set (e.g., 3 for "V3"). 
                          Defaults to 3 (Gain ×100).

Returns:
    bool: True if the gain level was successfully set.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the gain value is not between 1 and 5 or if there is 
                an error setting the gain level or the device 
                returns an unexpected response.

methods.name: opsys_integrating_sphere.artifex_controller.ArtifexController.get_power_gain
documentation:
Get the power gain level for the Artifex device.

Returns:
    str: The power gain level.

Raises:
    ValueError: If there is an error reading the power gain level.
OPM150 Artifex Integrating Sphere Controller
